title: The Five Elders Descend
description: On pages 14–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Franky as Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.
scene: Luffy’s Gear Fifth form re-enters the battle while the giants arrive, Vegapunk’s broadcast begins, and the Five Elders become the island’s central threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah, so you know about that?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your crew is always up to something! What do you hope to get out of these stunts?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're still on the island! Couldn't you have warped us any further?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: SuperSonic Van Auguri maiden Hunter Catarina Devon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I never thought we'd meet in a place like this!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a pirate like you! My name's caribou! I've been looking for you guys for-like-everrr! Ah, sorry... I meant to say forever!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I set sail 'cause I wanted to be a great man, just like him! He's my idol! My hero!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've always dreamed of being a Lockey on Commodore teach's crew!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's all I've ever wished for! Please take me to meet him!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From it cover and color spread next issue!

summary: This part advances the Nika Returns on Egghead through 16 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
